market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This stunning Birmingham home features [insert property-specific details about layout, location advantages, architectural style or unique features]. Sleeps up to 4 guests perfectly, ideal for [insert target guest type - family/group/solo travelers etc]. Located in [specific Birmingham area/neighborhood], you'll enjoy easy access to [insert 2-3 local attractions or conveniences]. Includes [insert property-specific amenities like fireplace, patio, or other features]. Book now for a premium Birmingham stay experience with all the comforts of a home away from home.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living room should be the cover photo, as it provides the best first impression of the home's interior space and ambiance.
key_diagnosis: Priced at £630/night (260% above the £175 median) but only at 15.2% occupancy (76 open nights), this listing is underperforming relative to the market rate-occupancy relationship.
Title 'Your group stays Birmingham' fails to capture attention and lacks differentiation in a competitve £175 median market.
Blank description leaves prospects with no compelling narrative to justify the premium price point.
analysis.outreach_hook: This Birmingham listing charges £630/night (260% above the median) but only has 15.2% occupancy vs the cohort's 28.3% - a significant opportunity to leverage its unique assets.
